intended_use_full: TribusConnect is a cloud-based DICOM viewer designed for medical professionals to securely access, review, manipulate, measure and visualize DICOM images. The software is intended to be used by trained healthcare professionals, including but not limited to radiologists, physicians, nurses, and technicians.
target_condition: Cardiac interventions, specifically left atrial appendage closure (LAAC) and other cardiac procedures
ground_truth: For heart segmentation: qualitative evaluation by 2 US board-certified radiologists. For LAA localization: comparison with predicate device TruPlan (K222593) landing zone contour center.
other_metrics: Heart segmentation: 100% bone removal correct, 99% of cases each segmented structure clearly visible, 100% of cases rendered heart clinically usable. LAA Localization: 97% of cases within 10mm of landing zone contour center (average distance 4.40mm, standard deviation 2.74mm). Manual measurements within 5% of true value.
